name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil
notes:
This building block detects clearing of eventlogs using wevtutil.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Eventlog Clear or Configuration Change
SIGMA Description: Detects clearing or configuration of eventlogs using wevtutil, powershell and wmic. Might be used by ransomwares during the attack (seen by NotPetya and others).


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wevtutil.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-log %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% cl %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-log %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% sl %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%lfn:%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via Wevtutil on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wevtutil.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-log %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% cl %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-log %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% sl %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%lfn:%') AQL filter query
